name: Agent Integration Idea
about: Suggest a new agent integration for the Community Hub
title: "[Agent] "
labels: agent-integration, community
assignees: ''
---

## Agent description

What does this agent do? What problem does it solve?

## Framework / Model

- **Framework:** [e.g., LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, custom]
- **Model(s):** [e.g., GPT-4, Claude, Llama, any]

## Use case

Describe a concrete scenario where this agent would be useful.

## Would you like to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build and submit this agent — point me to the [integration guide](https://dspatch.dev/docs)!
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to build

## Additional context

Links, references, or any other details.
